underlying_goal: Maintain and improve a Travel Planner app: update CLAUDE.md docs, fix deployment config, resolve mobile dark mode text visibility bug, add Vercel analytics, and build a flight layover feature
friction_detail: The mobile dark mode text visibility fix required 4 attempts before Claude identified the root cause (dark mode CSS tokens), and even then the fix didn't fully work on first deploy.
brief_summary: User worked on multiple improvements to their Travel Planner app including docs, deployment fixes, a persistent mobile dark mode bug (took multiple attempts), analytics integration, and a flight layover feature that was mostly completed before hitting usage limits.
